name: Taking Flight
description: Learn the basics of trading, navigation, and survival in the galaxy.

steps.name: Travel to any adjacent sector
steps.description: Use the warp drive to move to a neighboring sector.

codec.giver: Feddy, Senior Federation Support Chatbot (Mark IX)
pages: Thanks for contacting Federation contract support. Your call is very important to us. Please hold for the next available agent... <emotion value="disappointed">Oh. That's me.</emotion> I guess I'll have to take this.
Looks like you've got a ship. Good for you. I'll show you the basics of navigation, trading and survival in the galaxy. <emotion value="disappointed">Because it's my job.</emotion> So let's do this.

Your first task is to travel to an adjacent sector. Use your ship's warp drive to move to a neighboring location. You <emotion value="sarcastic">probably</emotion> learned this in fifth grade, but in hyperspace you can't just warp anywhere, so pay attention to those lines on the map - they tell you where the warp corridors in this sector lead to. You'll figure it out, you seem all right. Good luck...

steps.name: Locate the Megaport
steps.description: Find a sector that contains a Megaport.

codec.giver: Feddy, Senior Federation Support Chatbot (Mark IX)
pages: <emotion value="surprised">Honestly that wasn't too bad!</emotion> Maybe you'll be a pilot after all. You should look for a Megaport next. The Megaport is a major hub for trade and commerce in this part of the galaxy. If you want a career in trading, that's where you need to be. <emotion value="disappointed">I wish I could travel the galaxy too, but I'm stuck here making these calls...</emotion> Keep warping to adjacent sectors until you find one that contains a Megaport. Once you arrive, you'll have access to markets, shipyards, and other facilities that can help you.

steps.name: Refuel your ship
steps.description: Purchase warp fuel to recharge your drives.

codec.giver: Feddy, Senior Federation Support Chatbot (Mark IX)
pages: Yeah, you found the Megaport, this is it. Bright lights, big port. <emotion value="disappointed">Sure is nicer than my underground data center. The light went out 86 years ago...</emotion> Anyway, you should refuel your ship. You don't want to get stuck out there with no fuel, so charge up.

steps.name: Purchase a commodity
steps.description: Buy goods from a port to begin trading.

steps.name: Earn 1000 credits trading
steps.description: Generate at least 1000 credits in trading profit.

codec.giver: Feddy, Senior Federation Support Chatbot (Mark IX)
pages: <emotion value="content">You made your first trade! Looks like my advice is actually useful for once.</emotion> Now, you should know that the Sparrow you're flying is a loaner from the Federation. It's actually been missing from our records for 35 years. Once the quartermaster finds out, they'll want it back. So you should get your own ship.

<emotion value="anticipation">I'm thinking you could get a... Kestrel Courier?</emotion> Yeah, that would work. It's fast, reliable, and an upstart like you can probably afford it. Keep trading between ports — buy low, sell high — and you should get there.

steps.name: Purchase a kestrel
steps.description: Buy a Kestrel Courier from a shipyard.

steps.name: Accept a contract from the contracts board
steps.description: Visit the contracts board and accept a new contract from the Venture Chamber.

codec.giver: Feddy, Senior Federation Support Chatbot (Mark IX)
pages: <emotion value="proud">Nice work on the Kestrel!</emotion> For once I get to deal with someone who gets things done. You make an old support bot proud. <emotion value="nostalgic">Moments like these make me feel like it was all worth it...</emotion>

<emotion value="neutral" />Ahem. Anyway. You should look for new contracts. This one came to you because you had a Federation ship, but there are other assignments out there from all sorts of entities. You'll find them at the Megaport, accessible via a button in the Player panel. I've heard that the Venture Chamber is encouraging people to start corporations. That would really level up your trading. <emotion value="affectionate">Check it out. It's been good meeting you.</emotion>
